Dior D-LITE Handbag
 ✨ Blue map 5-grid embroidery ✨
This Lady D-Lite handbag blends classic elegance with a fashionable look. Embroidered throughout with Pietro Ruffo's design, it highlights the classic butterfly beauty of the series, accented with the text L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles. The front features the Christian Dior Paris logo, paired with a light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Medium size, with a detachable embroidered wide shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody.

Dior Groove♣️16 Mini Bag 'Black Embossed Check'
This Dior Groove 16 mini bag is a new addition to the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from black calfskin with embossing, it features a quilted oversized check pattern to elevate the style. The spacious compartment holds various daily essentials. With a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily looks.
Zipper closure
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 1365
Size: 16 x 10 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder, keys, and lipstick
